text: I feel a certain anticipation standing in this modern, sterile corridor, glass and white walls reflecting the buzz of electric light. Crossing into the R+D space, I am engulfed by color and information. Screens, words, and symbols create an atmosphere of innovation—a place in motion, searching. I feel simultaneously curious and a little detached, as though on the threshold of insight, not quite settled but open to whatever this evolving environment might reveal. There is a subtle hum of possibility here.
